user.title: IKEA BILRESA
user.description: Connect to the Matter Server that already controls your BILRESA wheels. The URL is pre-filled from your Matter integration — leave it as is unless you run the Matter Server elsewhere.

reconfigure.title: Change Matter Server connection
reconfigure.description: Update the Matter Server WebSocket URL. The new address is tested before the integration reconnects.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Matter Server. Check the URL and that the Matter Server add-on is running.

abort.already_configured: IKEA BILRESA is already set up.

user.title: Configure a BILRESA control
user.description: Choose a BILRESA device or copy an existing binding. Wheel channels show rotary and button actions; dual-button endpoints show only the actions their hardware supports.

data.copy_from: Copy settings from an existing binding (optional)
data.target: Target (light, media player, cover, climate, fan, number)
data.min_brightness: Minimum brightness (%, 0 = scroll can switch off)
data.scenes: Scenes cycled by single press (optional, overrides its action)

data_description.button_response: Instant runs on the initial press and requires multi-press and hold actions to be disabled. Fast release runs after the first short release. Multi-press aware waits for the completed gesture. Public BILRESA events remain fully classified in every mode.

profile.title: Choose a wheel profile
profile.description: Select starting defaults for this wheel channel. You can adjust every value on the next screen.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure control binding
reconfigure.description: Adjust this wheel channel or dual-button endpoint. Only options supported by the selected hardware are shown.

data.target: Target (light, media player, cover, climate, fan, number)
data.min_brightness: Minimum brightness (%, 0 = scroll can switch off)
data.scenes: Scenes cycled by single press (optional, overrides its action)

data_description.button_response: Instant runs on the initial press and requires multi-press and hold actions to be disabled. Fast release runs after the first short release. Multi-press aware waits for the completed gesture. Public BILRESA events remain fully classified in every mode.

error.fast_response_conflicts_with_multi_press: Fast response cannot be combined with a multi-press target. Remove that target or choose multi-press recognition.
error.instant_response_conflicts_with_multi_pr: Instant response cannot be combined with a multi-press target. Remove that target or choose multi-press recognition.
error.instant_response_conflicts_with_hold: Instant response cannot be combined with a separate hold action. Set hold to Do nothing or choose Fast release / Multi-press aware.
error.mode_target_mismatch: This target is not compatible with the selected scroll control. Choose a matching entity or change what scrolling controls.
error.target_required: Choose a target for this action, or set the action to Do nothing.

abort.no_devices: No supported BILRESA devices have been discovered yet. Make sure the device works in the Matter integration, then try again.

options.multi_press: Recognize single, double or triple press

cannot_connect.title: Cannot reach the Matter Server
cannot_connect.description: IKEA BILRESA cannot connect to the Matter Server at {url}. Scroll wheels won't respond until the connection is restored. Check that the Matter Server add-on is running.
